action.reasoning: Observation: the re-submission confirmed our current best Quickdraw accuracy remains 0.1613 with ResNet-50 + augmentation + flip TTA. Analysis: recent expensive explorations (DINOv2, consistency loss) underperformed, so the best remaining low-risk avenue is a stronger supervised backbone that is known to work for DomainNet DG: ViT-B/16 AugReg. We still have enough time for a short pilot, and we should measure true target transfer before any longer run. Decision: add an offline-safe timm ViT-B/16 AugReg classifier to model loading/training/prediction, run a short 2-epoch pilot with the existing successful training recipe, validate locally, and if it looks sane submit next iteration.
action.command: python train.py --data_dir /data --backbone vit_b16_augreg --epochs 2 --batch_size 96 --lr 3e-4 --weight_decay 0.05 --dropout 0.1 --num_workers 12 --output_dir checkpoints/vit_augreg_pilot && python validate.py --data_dir /data --checkpoint checkpoints/vit_augreg_pilot/best.pt --tta_mode none --batch_size 128 --num_workers 8 && python validate.py --data_dir /data --checkpoint checkpoints/vit_augreg_pilot/best.pt --tta_mode flip --batch_size 128 --num_workers 8

usage: train.py [-h] [--data_dir DATA_DIR] [--output_dir OUTPUT_DIR]

                [--lr LR] [--weight_decay WEIGHT_DECAY] [--dropout DROPOUT]
                [--proj_dim PROJ_DIM] [--label_smoothing LABEL_SMOOTHING]
                [--mixup_alpha MIXUP_ALPHA]
                [--consistency_weight CONSISTENCY_WEIGHT]
                [--sketch_cls_weight SKETCH_CLS_WEIGHT] [--seed SEED]
